name: Sun-Dried Tomato Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb sundried tomatoes, dehydrated; not in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Reconstitute the sundried tomatoes in boiling water according to package directions.
2. In a saucepan over low heat, combine the rehydrated tomatoes with the remaining ingredients. Cover and cook for 20 minutes.
3. Puree the mixture in a food processor. Store in the refrigerator for up to one month if tightly covered.
